signals.headline: Bitcoin rallies to $77,401, Ethereum climbs to $2,430, and Solana trades at $89
signals.raw:
Bitcoin rallies to $77,401, Ethereum climbs to $2,430, and Solana trades at $89.27** with several institutional developments driving market activity.

## Key Announcements

signals.headline: Charles Schwab Launches Crypto Trading** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Charles Schwab Launches Crypto Trading** | YES | HIGH confidence
Charles Schwab has officially launched Bitcoin and Ethereum spot trading, offering 24/7 support from professionals via phone and chat[2]. This represents significant institutional adoption and accessibility expansion.

signals.headline: Singapore Gulf Bank Stablecoin Service** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Singapore Gulf Bank Stablecoin Service** | YES | HIGH confidence
Singapore Gulf Bank introduced institutional stablecoin minting and redemption directly from bank accounts using Solana's blockchain, supporting USDC transactions above $100,000 with temporary fee waivers[2]. Additional stablecoins including USDT, USDE, and USDG are planned to follow[2].

signals.headline: Kraken Parent Payward Acquires Bitnomial** | YES | MEDIUM confidence
signals.raw:
Kraken Parent Payward Acquires Bitnomial** | YES | MEDIUM confidence
Kraken's parent company Payward has acquired derivatives trading platform Bitnomial, expanding institutional derivatives offerings[1].
